def negative_test_asserts_private_attribute_value_instead_of_behavior():
    rule_id = "test_asserts_private_attribute_value_instead_of_behavior"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Test asserts the value of a private attribute (_name) instead of observable public behavior."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
